title: [SQL] Add your name to CONTRIBUTORS.md
body:
Add your name and one fun fact to `sql/CONTRIBUTORS.md` in the table.

This is a great first-ever PR — the goal is just to practice fork → branch → PR → merge.

title: [SQL] Fix the typo in the track README
body: There's a typo in `sql/README.md` (hint: 'recieve' should be 'receive'). Fix it and open a PR.

title: [SQL] Add a comment to exercises/sample_01
body: Add a one-line comment explaining what `sql/exercises/sample_01` does.

title: [SQL] Fix inconsistent indentation in exercises/sample_02
body: `sql/exercises/sample_02` has inconsistent indentation. Clean it up so it's consistent throughout.

title: [SQL] Add your GitHub username to PARTICIPANTS.md
body: Add your GitHub username as a new bullet in `sql/PARTICIPANTS.md`.

title: [SQL] Alphabetize the quick reference list
body: `sql/reference.md` has an unsorted list. Alphabetize it.

title: [SQL] Add a welcome message
body: Add a short welcome sentence or emoji to `sql/WELCOME.md`.

title: [SQL] Add a changelog entry
body: Add a one-line entry to `sql/CHANGELOG.md` describing this very PR (e.g. 'Added welcome message').

title: [SQL] Add an FAQ entry
body: Think of a question a brand-new student in SQL might ask, and add a Q&A entry to `sql/FAQ.md`.

title: [SQL] Add a comment to exercises/sample_03
body: `sql/exercises/sample_03` needs a short comment explaining its purpose. Add one.

title: [SQL] Add a Definition-of-Done checklist item
body: Add one more checklist item to `sql/CONTRIBUTING_NOTES.md` that you think matters for this track.

title: [SQL] Fix broken markdown link
body: The link to CONTRIBUTING.md in `sql/README.md` may be broken depending on your fork structure — verify it and fix it if needed.

title: [SQL] Clean up notes.md formatting
body: `sql/notes.md` has inconsistent indentation on purpose. Fix it so every line is consistently formatted.

title: [SQL] Add a resources bullet
body: Add one bullet point under a new 'Resources' section in `sql/README.md` — a link you found helpful for SQL.

title: [SQL] Open a PR with just a whitespace fix
body: Find any trailing whitespace or missing final newline in a file under `sql/` and fix it. Small PRs count too!
